summary: Comprehensive testing of Bookmark and Notes features completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all features - bookmark save/delete, notes CRUD, export PDF, notes panel toggle, notes count badge. Scroll position restoration confirmed working via toast message.
passed_tests: Bookmark CRUD - Create bookmark saves scroll position
Bookmark CRUD - Get bookmark for specific page
Bookmark CRUD - Update bookmark scroll position
Bookmark CRUD - Get all bookmarks
Bookmark CRUD - Delete bookmark
Bookmark CRUD - Delete nonexistent bookmark returns 404
Notes CRUD - Create note
Notes CRUD - Get notes for page
Notes CRUD - Get all notes
Notes CRUD - Update note
Notes CRUD - Delete note
Notes CRUD - Delete nonexistent note returns 404
Notes CRUD - Update nonexistent note returns 404
Notes Export - Export notes with page content
Notes Export - Export from nonexistent page returns 404
Notes Persistence - Notes persist across requests
UI - Bookmark button saves position and shows 'Bookmarked' state
UI - Bookmark button removes bookmark and shows 'Bookmark' state
UI - Notes panel opens/closes with toggle button
UI - Add new note to wiki page
UI - Edit existing note
UI - Delete note
UI - Notes count badge displays correctly
UI - Export as PDF button works
UI - Scroll position restored on revisit (confirmed via toast)
critical_code_review_comments: Export PDF generates HTML file - may want actual PDF generation in future enhancement
Scroll position restoration timing (500ms setTimeout) - may need adjustment for slower connections
seed_data_creation: None - used existing wiki pages for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bookmark and Notes features are fully implemented and working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_bookmarks_notes.py covers all CRUD operations. Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements (bookmark-button, notes-toggle-button, notes-panel, new-note-input, add-note-button, export-pdf-button, edit-note-button-{id}, delete-note-button-{id}).

bookmarking.show_bookmarked_state: ✓ Working - button shows 'Bookmarked' with BookmarkCheck icon
bookmarking.restore_scroll_position: ✓ Working - restores position on page revisit
bookmarking.delete_bookmark: ✓ Working - removes bookmark and updates UI

notes.add_note: ✓ Working - note appears immediately in list
notes.export_pdf: ✓ Working - generates HTML file for print-to-PDF
